query:
SELECT 
  o.orderNumber,
  o.customerName,
  o.customerPhone,
  o.totalAmount / 100 as totalRupees,
  o.paymentStatus,
  o.paymentMethod,
  o.razorpayPaymentId,
  o.orderStatus,
  o.orderType,
  o.createdAt
FROM orders o
WHERE (
  -- Mar 30 around 1:01pm - amount 1432.20
  (DATE(o.createdAt) = '2026-03-30' AND o.totalAmount BETWEEN 143200 AND 143240)
  -- Mar 28 around 2:08pm - amount 388.50
  OR (DATE(o.createdAt) = '2026-03-28' AND o.totalAmount BETWEEN 38840 AND 38860)
  -- Mar 28 around 12:49pm - amount 1281.00
  OR (DATE(o.createdAt) = '2026-03-28' AND o.totalAmount BETWEEN 128090 AND 128110)
  -- Mar 21 around 1:54pm - amount 824.50
  OR (DATE(o.createdAt) = '2026-03-21' AND o.totalAmount BETWEEN 82440 AND 82460)
  -- Mar 21 around 9:11am - amount 519.76
  OR (DATE(o.createdAt) = '2026-03-21' AND o.totalAmount BETWEEN 51960 AND 51990)
  -- Mar 17 around 11:57am - amount 1606.50
  OR (DATE(o.createdAt) = '2026-03-17' AND o.totalAmount BETWEEN 160640 AND 160660)
  -- Mar 15 around 12:31pm - amount 1265.26
  OR (DATE(o.createdAt) = '2026-03-15' AND o.totalAmount BETWEEN 126510 AND 126540)
  -- Mar 15 around 11:07am - amount 850.50
  OR (DATE(o.createdAt) = '2026-03-15' AND o.totalAmount BETWEEN 85040 AND 85060)
  -- Mar 10 around 1:12pm - amount 903.00
  OR (DATE(o.createdAt) = '2026-03-10' AND o.totalAmount BETWEEN 90290 AND 90310)
  -- Mar 1 around 3:38pm - amount 388.50
  OR (DATE(o.createdAt) = '2026-03-01' AND o.totalAmount BETWEEN 38840 AND 38860)
)
ORDER BY o.createdAt DESC
